item.title: GPT-5 Released with Enhanced Reasoning
item.description: OpenAI has released GPT-5 with 40% improvement in coding benchmarks. The new model supports 1M token context and costs 30% less than GPT-4.

item.title: Claude Code Gets Multi-File Editing
item.description: Anthropic shipped multi-file editing for Claude Code. Solo developers can now refactor across files in a single command.

item.title: Old Story Outside Window
item.description: This is an old story that should be filtered out.
